sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Verse1Pasian inkha a hih man, a mah biakpiakna ding in,
Na khatawh a mah bia in phat lecin.
Hermon mualah daitui bang, van daituite hongkia in,
Hopihna nang zong zathei niteh.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: ka khathabek tawh kakha thabek tawh,
ka kha thabek in lawhcing thei niteh,
Thu haksapente'n zong nama hongkhak zo ke'n teh,
Kakha hang nama natun zo ding hi.
Verse2
Khris a ding nuntak na ah, a siangtho nuntak na ding,
Teep leh muam neek leh dawn kizawh kul hi,
A siangtho gamtat kampau, Nakhempeuh kidek zo lo,
Tua tezong ka kha bektawh Topa'n ci
Verse3.
Gupngah lam hong kitel sak, dam ngah lam hong kitel
sak,
Hauh ngah lam hong kitelsak khat om hi,
Vangliat natawh dawi hawlkhia, damlo te damsak
theih na,
Tlung lam pan a hong nai kha hang bek hi.
